items.title: Reducer and context boundary: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this React: Component-Based Browser Applications misconception? Context should replace all props and local state throughout an application.
hints: Compare both options with platform semantics and observable user or browser evidence.

feedback.correct: Correct. Use context for genuinely cross-cutting subtree data, keep local state local, and split contexts by change pattern.
feedback.incorrect: That preserves the misconception. Use context for genuinely cross-cutting subtree data, keep local state local, and split contexts by change pattern.
